name: Faux Marble and Metal Accent Table Gold - Threshold™: Brushed Gold Frame, 3-Tier Square Display
description:
Add stylish functionality with a touch of glam to your space with this Faux-Marble and Metal Accent Table from Threshold™. With a three-tiered square silhouette, this accent table looks stunning with its white faux-marble shelves and gleaming gold-tone metal frame. The three open shelves provide ample display space for decor, books, photo frame or plants, elevating the overall aesthetic of your room.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.

OVERALL WIDTH – 18”
OVERALL HEIGHT – 24”
OVERALL DEPTH – 18”
DISTANCE FROM FLOOR TO BOTTOM SHELF – 4”
DISTANCE BETWEEN SHELFS – 9.05”
DEPTH OF FAUX MARBLE BOARD – 16.8”
LEG THICKNESS - .63”
